active.title: Blog Hermes K8s Install
active.summary: Create a bilingual blog post (en/pt-br) teaching how to install the Hermes agent on Kubernetes. The post will walk through each Kubernetes resource from the manifests in `../iac/files/kubernetes/hermes`, explaining what each component does and how to deploy them with `kubectl`/`kustomize`. The post should include prerequisites, step-by-step instructions, configuration options, and verification steps.
